author: bharatankaraju
description: Per-ticker residual-reversion fade trades using sector-cohort leave-one-out mean residuals with rolling 20-day lagged sigma. Entry at |z|>=3 on a given session; exit at subsequent close. EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1).

universe.coverage_ratio_estimate_pct_delisted: <5% — NOT yet measured; Section 6 builds this gate

date_range.notes: Initial 3-month holdout per Section 10.1. Full 20% holdout will require waiting until sufficient new data accrues or accepting a smaller tuning window.

statistical_test.rationale: Bonferroni/FDR in effect under Section 14.5 primary=ticker-family scope; Section 9B.2 requires >=100k when multiplicity active.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Primary: 213 tickers x 2 directions = 426 pairwise hypotheses. Bonferroni adjusted alpha = 0.05 / 426 = 1.17e-4.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per ticker before hypothesis passes 9.2 gate

pre_exploration_disclosure: An exploratory pre-standards run on 2026-04-23 (commits f5af8d8, subsequent) examined the same universe informally. That run is NOT the registered test and is tagged RESEARCH-only. Known exploratory finding: TORNTPOWER showed +1.53% gross edge at 1000-shuffle p=0.0000, but at that resolution Bonferroni-adjusted significance (p <= 1.17e-4) is unreachable — the formal registered run will re-test at >=100k shuffles. No point estimates from the exploratory run shall be used to set thresholds for the formal test (Section 0.3).

author: bharatankaraju
description: Single-ticker single-direction pilot of the TA Coincidence Scorer. Enter LONG RELIANCE on any session where the daily TA attractiveness score (0-100, logistic of 6-feature interaction model from pipeline.ta_scorer) is >=70 at EOD close. Exit at subsequent close (T+1). EOD-entry MODE A (Section 7.1). This is the first deployment of the Compliance framework on a TA-class hypothesis; designed to be a single-hypothesis pilot so multiplicity correction is inert (family size = 1).

claimed_edge.notes: User-specified claimed edge: net T+1 >= 0.5% at S1 slippage (20 bps round-trip Zerodha SSF), hit-rate >= 55%, p <= 1e-3 at >=100k permutations. Single-hypothesis family means no Bonferroni/FDR adjustment is applied.

universe.survivorship_status: N/A — single-ticker pilot, RELIANCE has been continuously listed through the entire window

date_range.notes: 3-month forward holdout. Under-spec vs Section 10.1 20% requirement — flagged, accepted for pilot. If gate fails for holdout-size reason alone, extend holdout.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-hypothesis family means p_raw <= 0.001 is equivalent to p_corrected <= 0.001 (no adjustment needed). 100k permutations still required for p-value resolution below the 1e-3 floor per Section 9B.2.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1: no multiplicity correction. If the TA scorer is later extended to more tickers, each new (ticker, direction) becomes its own registered hypothesis with ticker-family multiplicity in effect.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed from the daily return std of RELIANCE over the training window, prior to gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The TA Coincidence Scorer was fitted on RELIANCE via UAP Task 8 (commit da9e0cf and follow-ups). The current RELIANCE model shows health=RED, mean_auc=0.485, min_fold_auc=0.173 across 6 walk-forward quarterly folds, which indicates the classifier does not exceed chance on out-of-sample data. This pre-registration deliberately proceeds despite the RED health — the purpose of the pilot is to demonstrate the compliance gate rejects un-robust TA strategies before they reach PAPER-SHADOW, mirroring the Phase C precedent (H-2026-04-23-001 FAIL, 2026-04-23). No point estimates from the walk-forward are used to set the 0.5%/55%/1e-3 thresholds (Section 0.3 pre-registration principle upheld; the thresholds match the phase-c registration for consistency across the framework).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FOLLOW trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_LAG events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) != sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction agree on this slice by construction. Entry LONG if expected_return>0 else SHORT at EOD close; exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. Registered as a distinct family from H-2026-04-23-001 because the event-restriction changes the null distribution and the family size.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after LAG-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: The parent hypothesis H-2026-04-23-001 was executed and failed Bonferroni (0 survivors at 1.17e-4). An FDR research memo flagged 5 positive-edge survivors at BH-FDR alpha=0.05; separately, the spec 2026-04-23-phase-c-follow-vs-fade-audit-design.md observed that backtest FADE and live engine FOLLOW agree on LAG-geometry events but disagree on OVERSHOOT-geometry events. This registration tests the LAG slice in isolation. No slice p-values have been computed prior to this registration. No thresholds are derived from slice-observed numbers — all thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 (Section 0.3 pre-registration upheld).
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: FADE trades on Phase C OPPORTUNITY_OVERSHOOT events — the geometric slice where sign(expected_return) == sign(residual). Backtest FADE direction and live engine FOLLOW direction are opposite on this slice by construction. Entry SHORT if expected_return>0 else LONG at EOD close (the OPPOSITE of what the live engine does today); exit T+1 close. MODE A EOD. If this passes and H-2026-04-23-002 does not, the live engine is actively mis-trading overshoot events.

claimed_edge.notes: Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-23-001 for framework consistency (spec §7.5). Not derived from slice's observed numbers (§0.3 pre-registration rule).

date_range.notes: Inherits H-2026-04-23-001 holdout window; same 3-month forward slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Reuse H-2026-04-23-001 compliance engine — see runner_phase_c_slice.py. Family size depends on post-filter cell count (n>=10 after OVERSHOOT-only restriction).

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size finalized after n>=10 filter applies — written into the slice run's manifest.json.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect_pct_at_80_power: to be computed per cell from the slice's standard deviation before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: Same as H-2026-04-23-002. No slice p-values computed before registration. No thresholds derived from slice-observed numbers.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: Lasso regression on 236-dim cross-sectional feature vector (212 peer z-scores + 17 sector means + vix + 3 regime one-hots + 2 self z's + break direction) predicting T+1 return on the persistent-break subset (|z|>=3 on T and T-1, same sign) of the 14,907-event H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel. Sign-triggered trading rule around frozen epsilon = 0.5*median(|training_predictions|). Single-model family: Bonferroni alpha = 0.05.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-model family. No point estimates from exploratory work are used to calibrate thresholds. Epsilon is calibrated on training-set prediction magnitudes, not holdout.

date_range.notes: Holdout 6% flagged as warning vs Section 10.1 20% target; accepted at registration to maintain comparability with H-2026-04-23-001/002/003 parent slice.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 is final; 100k shuffles per Section 9B.2 to resolve well below 1e-3 floor.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1: no multiplicity correction. Separate from the per-cell ticker-family scope of H-2026-04-23-001 by design.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set prediction std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel has been fully explored including 2 slice hypotheses (H-002 LAG, H-003 OVERSHOOT) all FAIL at Bonferroni. This new registration reframes from per-cell tests to a single family-of-1 predictive model. No feature weights, alphas, or thresholds from prior work are used to calibrate this model; the full LassoCV grid selects alpha on training data only. The 2-day persistence filter is pre-registered here, not derived from exploratory survivor inspection.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.
abandonment_reason: Pre-execution smoke check revealed only 116 persistent events satisfying |z|>=3 on both T and T-1 (same sign) in the 14,907-event parent panel. Spec anticipated 1,000-2,000 events and bound 'revisit if n<500'. Per Section 0.3 pre-registration rule, cannot relax z_threshold or persistence_days on this hypothesis ID. Abandoning before feature build/model fit; re-brainstorming a more populated persistence definition (likely |z|>=3 on T AND |z|>=2 on T-1, same sign) for registration as H-2026-04-24-003. No compute was spent on LassoCV or permutations; no point estimates were observed beyond raw event counts.

author: bharatankaraju
description: v2 of H-2026-04-24-002 (abandoned at n=116). Lasso regression on 236-dim cross-sectional feature vector over the asymmetric persistent-break subset (|z|>=3 on T AND |z|>=2 on T-1, same sign) of the 14,907-event H-2026-04-23-001 parent panel. Single-model family: Bonferroni alpha = 0.05.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-model family. Epsilon frozen on training-set prediction magnitudes.

date_range.notes: 18% holdout clears Section 9.3 >=50-event gate; still PARTIAL vs Section 10.1 20% target but substantially reduced warning vs H-002's 6%.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 is final; 100k shuffles per Section 9B.2.

power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set prediction std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: H-2026-04-24-002 was abandoned at n=116. Before registering this successor, a count-only diagnostic measured 5 candidate persistence rules: ORIG=116, A=318, B=507, C=316, D=675. Rule A was chosen for matching the T-1-specific persistence intuition of the parent thesis, NOT for maximizing count. 18% holdout window was chosen to give rule A's 318 events a ~57-event holdout, clearing the Section 9.3 >=50 gate. NO model fits, predictions, or p-values were computed from any rule before this registration; only raw event counts observed.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 — MODE A T, T+1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: T-7 to T-3 stock-vs-peer-cohort cumulative residual return z-scored against trailing 252d (trigger |z|>=1.5) with T-3 to T-1 dPCR same-direction >=1.0sigma confirmation (post-hoc cohort filter). Entry at T-3 close VWAP, exit T-1 close VWAP. Peers = top-3 nearest by market cap within NSE sectoral-index sector, frozen ex-ante. Macro exclude when |sector_index_return|>=1.5% on T or T+1 OR India VIX z(60d)>=2.0 on T. PCR feature is residualised against news-impact scores per data validation policy 14.4. No filter-relaxation fallback.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-hypothesis family. Thresholds copied from H-2026-04-24-001 precedent for framework consistency, NOT from earnings-window observations.

date_range.notes: 18-month window. 17% holdout clears 9.3 50-event gate; PARTIAL vs 10.1 20% target; user-specified window.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.05 final; 100k for resolution below 1e-3.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1; no multiplicity correction. Sector-level audit slices may be cut post-pass for risk attribution but do not affect the primary p-value.

power_analysis.expected_n_holdout: TBD post backfill - must clear 9.1 30-per-regime gate
power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: to be computed from training-set residual std before gate evaluation

pre_exploration_disclosure: User pre-locked four design parameters (T-1 strict exit, ex-ante same-sector + size-bucket peers, macro exclusion at 1.5% sector-index OR VIX z>=2sigma, no in-place filter relaxation) on 2026-04-25 in conversation. Trigger |z|>=1.5 and dPCR >=1.0sigma same-direction confirmed by user 2026-04-25 based on assistant proposal grounded in PEAD-literature convention and H-2026-04-24-001 precedent. Peer-cohort granularity (NSE sectoral indices) and size-bucket rule (top-3 nearest by market cap) recommended by assistant after user gave open-ended sector definition; locked into design without user override. IndianAPI corporate_actions endpoint was probed on 5 stocks (RELIANCE/HDFCBANK/TCS/MARUTI/BHARTIARTL) BEFORE this registration to confirm authenticity and earnings-event recoverability - only event counts and date cadences observed; NO returns, edges, or backtest numbers computed from any earnings-window data prior to this registration. Thresholds were NOT calibrated from any observed earnings-window distribution.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 - MODE A T-3, T-1 execution window gate applies.

author: bharatankaraju
description: Small multi-task MLP (~50k params) conditioned on T-1 ETF state vector (30 ETFs x {ret_1d, ret_5d, ret_20d} = 90 features) + per-ticker stock-context features (6) + learned stock embedding (8 dim) predicts T per-stock 3-class tail label (down_tail / neutral / up_tail) sigma-thresholded at |r_t| > 1.5 * sigma_60d (strict, sigma excludes t). Held-out cross-entropy loss must beat the strongest of three locked baselines (B0 always-prior, B1 regime-one-hot logistic, B2 full-feature logistic with 4 hand-designed ETF x stock-context interactions) by >= 0.005 nats. Single-claim, family size = 1, no Bonferroni. PyTorch CPU-only on Contabo VPS.

claimed_edge.notes: Single-hypothesis family. Margin and p-floor copied from H-2026-04-23-001 framework defaults; tightened p-floor to 0.01 (vs 0.05) because path D publishes accuracy claims directly to users.

universe.source: pipeline/data/fno_universe_history.json (point-in-time) intersected with pipeline/data/fno_historical/<symbol>.csv per-day membership
universe.drop_rule: Tickers with <30 down_tail OR <30 up_tail examples in training window are dropped at panel build with DROPPED_INSUFFICIENT_TAIL_LABELS; dropped list logged in panel manifest

date_range.notes: 12-month holdout = 17% of total panel; clears 9.3 50-event gate by ~3 orders of magnitude (n approx 52k); PARTIAL vs 10.1 20% target; user-accepted at registration. 24-month extension available pre-execution if desired.

statistical_test.rationale: Single-model family means p_raw <= 0.01 final; 100k for resolution below 1e-4. Permuting class labels in holdout breaks the ETF-feature -> tail-class signal while preserving class base rates.

hypothesis_family_scope.notes: Family size 1; no multiplicity correction. Per-class and per-ticker decompositions are post-hoc audit slices and do not affect the primary p-value.

power_analysis.expected_n_holdout: approx 52000 ticker-day predictions across 211 tickers x 250 trading days; well above 9.1 30-per-regime gate (52k / 5 regimes approx 10k per regime)
power_analysis.min_detectable_effect: 0.005 nats CE margin at p=0.01 with n=52k is detectable at >99% power per binomial-CE conversion

pre_exploration_disclosure: User pre-locked all design parameters in 2026-04-25 brainstorming session AFTER H-2026-04-25-001 backtest verdict (FAILED). Locked: (1) path D forecast-only deployment, path B basket tilt deferred to separate hypothesis; (2) 3-class label set (down/neutral/up), per-ticker sigma_60d threshold at 1.5 sigma; (3) input representation = raw ETF returns at 1d/5d/20d windows + stock embedding (8d) + stock context (6); (4) C1 single-claim model-level test + M3 calibration backstop; (5) architecture A small MLP under test, architecture C interactions logistic as locked baseline; (6) 12-month holdout with PARTIAL §10 acknowledged. Margin 0.005 nats and p-floor 0.01 are framework defaults from prior hypothesis precedent (H-2026-04-23-001 family, H-2026-04-25-001), NOT calibrated from any observed model output. sigma=1.5 chosen because it generates approx 7% per-tail base rates on Indian F&O daily returns (verified by ad-hoc count on RELIANCE/HDFCBANK/TCS WITHOUT inspecting any return values beyond the count). No exploratory model was fit before this registration. The 4 interaction terms in B2 baseline (brazil x sector, dollar x sector, vix x vol_z, india_etf x 52w_high_dist) are pre-locked at registration, no post-hoc additions allowed.
raw_bar_canonicity_policy: docs/superpowers/policies/2026-04-23-raw-bar-canonicity.md v1.0 - path D MODE_NONE_FORECAST_ONLY: no execution timing window applies.

changes.summary: Added 10 NSE sectoral indices (BANKNIFTY, NIFTYAUTO, NIFTYENERGY, NIFTYFMCG, NIFTYIT, NIFTYMEDIA, NIFTYMETAL, NIFTYPHARMA, NIFTYPSUBANK, NIFTYREALTY) to C.ETF_SYMBOLS. Net global state vector grows 28 -> 38 indices.
changes.rationale: Sectoral indices have continuous 5-year coverage (no IPO discontinuities) and provide India-side directional signal. Added to mitigate the data gap from NSE pre-2024 archive endpoints being permanently 404.

changes.summary: Universe pinned to canonical_fno_research_v1 (154 tickers = 133 stable F&O members + 21 IPOs with >= 100 bars).
changes.rationale: NSE pre-2024 F&O archive endpoints permanently 404; pre-2024 universe membership unrecoverable from public sources. Canonical universe artifact at pipeline/data/canonical_fno_research_v1.json provides point-in-time-correct membership for IPOs and a documented survivorship-bias bound for stable members.
